title: Walk-in Drive Financial Analyst at NHB Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Financial Analyst at NHB Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
NHB Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Gwalior. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NHB Holdings Services:
NHB Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHB Holdings Services!
